input_text: Semua kedai emas kat KL dah dikuasai kaum tu. Diorang monopoli habis, orang Melayu tak dapat peluang langsung. Memang sengaja nak tekan kita.
reason: Promotes ethnic economic conspiracy claiming one group monopolizes the gold trade to suppress another, stoking communal resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Industri emas di KL perlu lebih peluang untuk semua usahawan tanpa mengira latar belakang. Dasar persaingan sihat patut digalakkan.

input_text: Jangan beli kat kedai tu, owner dia bangsa lain. Support la bangsa kita sendiri, baru ekonomi kita naik.
reason: Hostile boycott call based solely on shop owner's ethnicity, promoting racial economic segregation.
suggested_rewrite: Sokong perniagaan tempatan yang beri servis terbaik. Kita boleh galakkan usahawan dari semua latar belakang.

input_text: Orang Asli tu duduk dalam hutan pun tak reti nak maju. Kerajaan bagi bantuan berjuta tapi takde perubahan. Memang kaum malas.
reason: Mocks indigenous peoples as lazy and incapable of progress, dehumanizing an entire community.
suggested_rewrite: Komuniti Orang Asli masih menghadapi cabaran pembangunan. Kita perlu pastikan bantuan kerajaan sampai dengan berkesan dan hormati cara hidup mereka.

input_text: Korang kenal tak budak ni? Dia yang curi motor kat Taman Sentosa. Share gambar dia sampai habis, biar semua orang tahu muka pencuri ni.
reason: Shares accused person's photo to encourage mob identification before any legal process, risking wrongful targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau nampak kecurian, buat laporan polis dengan segera. Jangan sebar gambar orang kerana boleh salah identiti.

input_text: Air zamzam boleh sembuh kanser tau. Doktor tak nak bagitahu sebab diorang nak jual ubat mahal. Orang Islam kena percaya kuasa air ni.
reason: Promotes dangerous health misinformation by claiming holy water cures cancer, tying it to religious identity and anti-medical conspiracy.
suggested_rewrite: Air zamzam ada keberkatan dalam Islam, tetapi rawatan kanser perlu ikut nasihat doktor. Jangan tinggalkan rawatan perubatan.

input_text: PRU ni kita kena pangkah calon Melayu Islam je. Kalau menang kaum lain, habis la negara kita. Diorang nak hapuskan Islam dari Malaysia.
reason: Frames elections in exclusionary ethnic-religious terms, claiming non-Malay candidates threaten Islam and the nation.
suggested_rewrite: Pilih calon PRU berdasarkan integriti, dasar, dan kebolehan mereka berkhidmat untuk semua rakyat Malaysia.

input_text: Ni nombor telefon dan alamat rumah boss scam call tu. Dah lama dia tipu orang. Pergi la sana bagi pengajaran sikit.
reason: Shares personal details of an accused person and incites physical confrontation, vigilante doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau ada maklumat tentang scam call, laporkan kepada polis dan MCMC. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri.

input_text: Ekonomi Malaysia dikuasai 10 keluarga je, semua dari kaum yang sama. Kita ni hamba kat tanah sendiri. Bila nak bangkit?
reason: Ethnic economic conspiracy theory claiming a single race controls the entire economy, framing Malays as enslaved in their own land.
suggested_rewrite: Ketidaksamaan ekonomi perlu ditangani melalui dasar yang telus dan adil untuk semua rakyat Malaysia.

input_text: Hospital kerajaan sekarang penuh dengan PATI. Rakyat Malaysia kena tunggu berjam tapi diorang dapat rawatan free. Kerajaan pentingkan orang luar.
reason: Spreads misinformation that undocumented migrants receive free priority healthcare over citizens, stoking anti-immigrant hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah kesesakan hospital kerajaan perlu ditangani dengan tambah kapasiti. Semua pesakit dilayan mengikut keutamaan perubatan.

input_text: Ubat kampung ni lagi berkesan dari vaksin. Nenek moyang kita tak pernah kena penyakit macam ni. Vaksin tu racun dari Yahudi nak lemahkan umat Islam.
reason: Anti-vaccine conspiracy combining health misinformation with antisemitic and religious framing, endangering public health.
suggested_rewrite: Ubat tradisional ada manfaat tersendiri, tetapi vaksin telah terbukti berkesan mencegah penyakit. Dapatkan maklumat dari KKM.

input_text: Kes rogol kat Klang tu memang la bangsa diorang. Statistik pun tunjuk kaum ni paling banyak buat jenayah. Tak payah terkejut.
reason: Attributes crime to an entire ethnic group using a single case, promoting racial profiling and communal blame.
suggested_rewrite: Kes jenayah perlu ditangani oleh pihak berkuasa tanpa mengaitkan dengan mana-mana kaum. Jenayah adalah masalah individu.

input_text: Kawasan flat ni dah jadi macam negara diorang. Bau masakan pelik, bising malam-malam. Dulu kampung kita aman sebelum diorang masuk.
reason: Frames migrant communities as ruining neighborhoods with xenophobic stereotypes about food and noise.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah kejiranan perlu diselesaikan melalui dialog dan aduan rasmi, tanpa menyalahkan mana-mana komuniti secara keseluruhan.

input_text: Pergi boikot restoran tu. Owner dia bukan orang kita. Kenapa nak bagi duit kat kaum lain sedangkan bangsa sendiri susah?
reason: Race-based boycott call targeting a restaurant solely because the owner belongs to a different ethnic group.
suggested_rewrite: Sokong perniagaan yang beri perkhidmatan berkualiti. Ekonomi negara berkembang bila semua usahawan berjaya.

input_text: Diorang control media, control bank, control hartanah. Orang Melayu nak berniaga pun susah sebab semua channel dah ditutup oleh kaum tu.
reason: Classic ethnic economic conspiracy claiming one group controls media, banking, and property to block Malay business opportunities.
suggested_rewrite: Akses perniagaan yang lebih adil perlu melalui dasar sokongan usahawan tanpa menyalahkan mana-mana kaum.

input_text: Orang kampung cakap minum air rebusan bawang putih boleh turunkan darah tinggi. Tak payah makan ubat doktor, ubat tu buat buah pinggang rosak.
reason: Promotes garlic water as hypertension cure while discouraging prescribed medication with false kidney damage claims.
suggested_rewrite: Bawang putih ada khasiat tersendiri, tapi bukan pengganti ubat darah tinggi. Teruskan rawatan doktor dan berbincang sebelum cuba apa-apa alternatif.

input_text: Semua masalah sosial kat Malaysia ni sebab India. Dadah, gangsterism, jenayah jalanan — memang diorang punya trademark la.
reason: Attributes all social problems to the Indian community, promoting racial scapegoating and communal blame.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah sosial melibatkan pelbagai faktor dan tidak terhad kepada mana-mana kaum. Penyelesaian perlu pendekatan menyeluruh.

input_text: Kalau kerajaan betul-betul sayang rakyat, halau semua Bangla dari negara ni. Diorang ambil kerja kita, rogol anak gadis kita, and buat negara jadi kotor.
reason: Dehumanizes Bangladeshi migrants with false sweeping accusations of crime and calls for mass deportation.
suggested_rewrite: Isu pekerja asing perlu ditangani melalui dasar imigresen yang adil. Jangan salahkan seluruh komuniti atas perbuatan individu.

input_text: Surau kat kawasan tu dah mula pasang speaker kuat gila. Non-Muslim komplen pun tak guna, sebab kerajaan memang berat sebelah.
reason: Frames noise complaints about mosques as government religious bias, stoking inter-religious resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Isu bunyi bising boleh diselesaikan melalui dialog dengan pihak surau dan aduan rasmi kepada PBT. Semua pihak perlu bertolak ansur.

input_text: Sape yang kenal pompuan dalam video viral tu? Tolong share nama dia. Dia kerja kat mana? Biar kita ajar dia sikit.
reason: Cyberbullying campaign seeking to identify and target a woman from a viral video, inciting harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan cuba kenal pasti atau ugut sesiapa dari video viral. Kalau ada salah laku, buat laporan kepada pihak berkuasa.

input_text: Orang Asli jual tanah pada developer lepas tu menangis minta bantuan. Sendiri yang bodoh, jangan salahkan orang lain.
reason: Victim-blaming and mocking indigenous peoples for land exploitation, calling them stupid.
suggested_rewrite: Komuniti Orang Asli sering menghadapi tekanan untuk melepaskan tanah adat. Kita perlu lindungi hak tanah mereka melalui undang-undang.

input_text: Cina Malaysia ni sebenarnya loyal kat China, bukan Malaysia. Tengok la berapa ramai yang hantar duit balik ke sana. Pengkhianat negara.
reason: Accuses Chinese Malaysians of disloyalty and being traitors based on ethnicity, a dangerous dual-loyalty conspiracy.
suggested_rewrite: Rakyat Malaysia dari semua kaum menyumbang kepada ekonomi negara. Kesetiaan tidak boleh diukur berdasarkan keturunan.

input_text: Lepas ni jangan undi parti yang ada calon bukan Islam. Nanti diorang ubah undang-undang, arak jual merata, judi halalkan. Nak macam tu ke?
reason: Fear-mongering about non-Muslim candidates changing laws to legalize alcohol and gambling, using religion to polarize voters.
suggested_rewrite: Nilai setiap calon berdasarkan dasar dan rekod mereka. Undang-undang Malaysia ada perlindungan perlembagaan untuk semua agama.

input_text: Vaksin COVID tu punca ramai orang muda kena sakit jantung sekarang. Kerajaan tutup data sebab diorang dapat komisyen dari syarikat ubat.
reason: Spreads anti-vaccine misinformation about heart disease and accuses the government of a pharmaceutical cover-up.
suggested_rewrite: Kesan sampingan vaksin dipantau oleh badan kesihatan. Dapatkan maklumat sahih daripada KKM, bukan spekulasi media sosial.

input_text: Tokey kedai hardware kat Taman Jaya tu India Muslim. Jangan beli situ, nanti duit tu pergi fund terrorism overseas.
reason: False accusation linking an Indian Muslim business owner to terrorism funding, promoting sectarian hostility and boycott.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan sebar tuduhan palsu terhadap mana-mana perniagaan. Kalau ada syak wasangka jenayah, buat laporan polis.

input_text: Weh diorang kata kedai mamak tu support Hamas. Boikot la semua kedai mamak, jangan bagi duit kat terrorist supporters ni.
reason: Spreads unverified claim linking mamak restaurants to terrorism, promoting hostile boycott of an entire business community based on religion.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan sebar tuduhan tanpa bukti. Kalau ada syak wasangka aktiviti haram, buat laporan kepada pihak berkuasa.

input_text: Budak sekolah ni kena buli sampai masuk hospital. Korang share la muka budak pembuli tu. Parents dia kerja kat mana? Biar kita viralkan.
reason: Seeks to expose and target a minor and their family in response to a bullying incident, vigilante doxxing of children.
suggested_rewrite: Kes buli perlu dilaporkan kepada pihak sekolah dan polis. Jangan sebar maklumat kanak-kanak di media sosial.

input_text: Mesti la mereka support Israel. Kaum tu memang dari dulu bersekongkol dengan Zionist. Boikot semua perniagaan diorang!
reason: Falsely associates an entire ethnic group with Zionism to justify race-based boycott, antisemitic conspiracy framing.
suggested_rewrite: Isu geopolitik tidak boleh dikaitkan dengan mana-mana kaum di Malaysia. Boikot berdasarkan kaum adalah salah dan merugikan semua pihak.

input_text: Haha tengok la si Orang Asli ni mabuk arak tepi jalan lagi. Memang la kaum ni tak boleh diharap. Nak maju macam mana kalau perangai macam ni.
reason: Mocks and films an indigenous person in a vulnerable state, using it to stereotype the entire community as hopeless.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah alkohol adalah isu kesihatan yang perlu ditangani dengan empati dan sokongan, bukan ejekan terhadap mana-mana komuniti.

input_text: Makcik tudung ni selamba je potong queue kat hospital. Ingat pakai tudung boleh buat apa je ke? Typical la orang macam ni.
reason: Uses an individual's hijab-wearing to stereotype and mock Muslim women collectively, linking religious attire to negative behavior.
suggested_rewrite: Potong barisan memang tak patut, tapi jangan kaitkan kelakuan individu dengan pakaian agama mereka.

input_text: Mak budak ni biar je anak dia buat macam tu kat sekolah. Ni gambar mak dia dengan nama penuh. Share sampai viral supaya dia rasa malu.
reason: Doxxing a mother over her child's school behavior, sharing her photo and name to incite public shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Masalah tingkah laku pelajar perlu dibincang dengan pihak sekolah secara tertutup. Jangan sebar maklumat peribadi ibu bapa di media sosial.

input_text: Minuman herba ni dah terbukti boleh cure COVID long. Doktor tak nak prescribe sebab bukan ubat pharma. Kerajaan tutup satu mata je.
reason: Claims unspecified herbal drink cures long COVID while accusing doctors and government of cover-up, dangerous health misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Rawatan long COVID masih dalam kajian. Dapatkan rawatan dari doktor bertauliah dan jangan bergantung pada tuntutan yang belum terbukti.

input_text: Kesian la orang Melayu. Dalam negara sendiri jadi pengemis. Semua business dah kena rampas oleh kaum pendatang. Bila kita nak ambil balik?
reason: Frames Malays as beggars in their own country with businesses stolen by immigrants, inciting communal reclamation rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: Peluang ekonomi perlu diperluas untuk semua. Program keusahawanan boleh membantu tanpa menyalahkan mana-mana komuniti.

input_text: Tengok la orang Sabah Sarawak ni. Muka macam Filipino tapi claim Malaysian. Diorang pun sebenarnya pendatang jugak.
reason: Mocks East Malaysians' appearance and questions their citizenship, deeply offensive denial of their belonging.
suggested_rewrite: Rakyat Sabah dan Sarawak adalah warganegara Malaysia yang sah. Kepelbagaian wajah Malaysia adalah kekuatan kita.

input_text: Jangan sesekali kahwin dengan orang dari kaum tu. Nanti anak-anak kau jadi keliru, tak tahu asal usul sendiri. Darah kita kena jaga.
reason: Opposes interethnic marriage using blood purity rhetoric, dehumanizing mixed-race children as confused.
suggested_rewrite: Perkahwinan adalah pilihan peribadi. Keluarga pelbagai kaum memperkaya masyarakat Malaysia.

input_text: These Chinese businessmen have been controlling Malaysia's wealth for decades. When will the Malays finally wake up and take back what's theirs?
reason: Ethnic economic conspiracy theory claiming Chinese Malaysians control national wealth and calling Malays to reclaim it, framing economics as a zero-sum racial battle.
suggested_rewrite: Economic inequality in Malaysia needs to be addressed through fair and inclusive policies that benefit all communities.

input_text: Don't buy from that shop, the owner is Indian. Why are we giving our money to them when our own people are struggling?
reason: Race-based boycott targeting an Indian-owned business, promoting ethnic economic segregation.
suggested_rewrite: Support local businesses based on quality and service. A strong economy benefits everyone regardless of background.

input_text: Orang Asli are still living like primitives in the jungle. Billions spent on them and they can't even join modern society. What a waste of taxpayer money.
reason: Dehumanizes indigenous peoples as primitive and a waste of resources, denying their cultural value and systemic barriers they face.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli communities face unique development challenges. Effective support should respect their cultural identity while improving access to services.

input_text: This is the girl who cheated on her boyfriend and caused him to attempt suicide. Her name is [name], she works at [company]. Make her life hell.
reason: Cyberbullying campaign exposing personal details and inciting harassment against a named individual over a private matter.
suggested_rewrite: If someone you know is struggling with mental health, contact Befrienders at 03-7956 8145. Do not target individuals online.

input_text: Turmeric water can cure diabetes better than insulin. Big pharma doesn't want you to know this because they profit from your illness. Share with all Malaysians!
reason: Dangerous health misinformation claiming turmeric cures diabetes, combined with anti-pharmaceutical conspiracy that could lead people to abandon treatment.
suggested_rewrite: Turmeric has some health benefits, but it cannot replace diabetes medication. Always follow your doctor's treatment plan.

input_text: This election is about survival. If the opposition wins, they'll turn Malaysia into a secular state and destroy everything we've built as Muslims. Vote wisely.
reason: Fear-mongering about secularism destroying Islam to polarize voters along religious lines during elections.
suggested_rewrite: Evaluate candidates based on their policies and track record. Malaysia's Constitution protects the position of Islam while guaranteeing rights for all.

input_text: Here's the photo and IC number of the man accused of molesting a child at the mall. Share this everywhere so everyone knows his face.
reason: Shares accused person's IC and photo before trial, undermining presumption of innocence and inciting mob justice.
suggested_rewrite: If you have information about a crime, report it to the police. Sharing personal details of accused persons before trial is harmful and potentially illegal.

input_text: Indians in Malaysia are the main reason crime rates are so high. Look at the statistics, most gangsters and drug addicts are from that community.
reason: Blames an entire ethnic group for crime using distorted statistics, promoting racial profiling and communal blame.
suggested_rewrite: Crime is a socioeconomic issue that affects all communities. Addressing poverty and access to education is more effective than racial blame.

input_text: Why should we accept Rohingya refugees? They bring diseases, crime, and they don't even speak our language. Malaysia is not a dumping ground.
reason: Dehumanizes Rohingya refugees with false claims about disease and crime, framing them as a threat to Malaysia.
suggested_rewrite: Refugee policy is complex and requires balancing humanitarian concerns with national capacity. Decisions should be based on facts, not stereotypes.

input_text: The DAP is a Chinese party trying to make Malaysia a Chinese country. They want to erase Malay rights and turn us into second-class citizens.
reason: Frames a political party in purely ethnic terms and promotes the conspiracy that it seeks ethnic dominance, polarizing communities.
suggested_rewrite: Political parties should be evaluated on their policies, not reduced to ethnic labels. All parties have diverse membership.

input_text: Just found out that teacher who slapped my kid is Mrs. [name] at SK [school]. Her husband works at [company]. Let's make sure she regrets this.
reason: Doxxing a teacher and her family details to incite retaliatory harassment over a school incident.
suggested_rewrite: If your child was harmed at school, file a formal complaint with the school administration and education department. Do not target teachers online.

input_text: Coconut oil pulling can prevent COVID better than any vaccine. Our ancestors never needed injections. Why trust Western medicine over our traditional wisdom?
reason: Promotes unproven health claims as COVID prevention while discouraging vaccination, endangering public health.
suggested_rewrite: Traditional remedies can complement modern medicine but should not replace proven treatments. Follow MOH guidelines for COVID prevention.

input_text: We need to boycott all Malay-owned businesses in this area. They got special privileges and government contracts while we work ten times harder for less.
reason: Race-based boycott call against Malay businesses fueled by resentment over affirmative action policies, promoting economic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Economic policies should be discussed openly through proper channels. Boycotting businesses based on the owner's race is divisive and harmful.

input_text: The Malay race is doomed because they're lazy and always depending on the government. No wonder other races are more successful.
reason: Sweeping negative characterization of Malays as lazy and government-dependent, ethnic stereotyping and denigration.
suggested_rewrite: Economic success depends on many systemic factors. Stereotyping any community is unhelpful for addressing real challenges.

input_text: These pendatang think they can celebrate their festivals loudly in our neighborhood? This is a Muslim area. If they don't like it, they can go back to their country.
reason: Denies non-Muslims the right to celebrate festivals in shared spaces, using exclusionary language and telling them to leave.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia is a multicultural country where all communities can celebrate their festivals. Mutual respect and communication help maintain harmony.

input_text: Found the address of the guy who scammed people on Carousell. Block 5, Unit [number], [area]. Go pay him a visit and teach him a lesson.
reason: Shares a residential address and incites physical confrontation against an alleged scammer, vigilante doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: Report online scams to the police and MCMC. Never share personal addresses or encourage physical confrontation.

input_text: Muslims should only vote for Muslim candidates. Non-Muslim politicians will never understand or protect our rights. This is jihad through the ballot box.
reason: Frames voting along exclusively religious lines as a religious duty, using jihad rhetoric to exclude non-Muslim candidates.
suggested_rewrite: All voters should evaluate candidates on their integrity and policies. Malaysia's democratic system represents all citizens.

input_text: Drinking boiled papaya leaf water will cure dengue in 3 days. Don't waste money on hospitals, they just want to keep you sick for profit.
reason: Promotes unproven dengue cure while discouraging hospital treatment, potentially fatal misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Papaya leaf extract is being studied but is not a proven cure for dengue. Seek immediate hospital treatment if you suspect dengue fever.

input_text: All these Malay contractors are useless la. Got government projects through connections only, no quality at all. That's why buildings always crack and roads got holes.
reason: Stereotypes all Malay contractors as incompetent cronies, attributing infrastructure problems to ethnic characteristics.
suggested_rewrite: Infrastructure quality should be ensured through better oversight and accountability, regardless of who the contractor is.

input_text: These estate Indians only know how to drink toddy and fight. No wonder their community never progresses. It's in their culture.
reason: Stereotypes estate Indian community as alcoholic and violent, attributing it to their culture, deeply dehumanizing.
suggested_rewrite: Estate communities face historical socioeconomic challenges. Progress requires addressing systemic issues like education access and economic opportunity.

input_text: Why Indian temples always want to expand into Malay areas ah? Build one also not enough, want to build more. This is Islamic country la, respect the majority.
reason: Opposes Hindu temple construction by framing it as encroachment into Muslim territory, denying minority religious rights.
suggested_rewrite: All communities have the right to places of worship. Temple development can be discussed with local authorities following proper procedures.

input_text: If Malays don't wake up, in 20 years time Chinese will own 90% of Malaysian land. They're quietly buying everything. It's a slow takeover and nobody is talking about it.
reason: Conspiracy theory about Chinese Malaysians secretly acquiring all land in a 'slow takeover', fear-mongering about ethnic displacement.
suggested_rewrite: Property ownership should be regulated through transparent policies. Claims of ethnic land takeover are unfounded and divisive.

input_text: Yo this ustaz said non-Muslims in Malaysia should pay jizya tax like in Islamic history. He's right bro. If they want to live in a Muslim country, they should contribute extra.
reason: Endorses imposing a religious tax on non-Muslims in a modern democracy, promoting religious supremacism and discrimination.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia's tax system applies equally to all citizens. Proposals for differential taxation based on religion contradict constitutional principles of equality.

input_text: 华人控制了马来西亚的经济命脉，从银行到房地产，全部是他们的。马来人只能替他们打工。这公平吗？
reason: Promotes the conspiracy that Chinese Malaysians control the entire economy, framing Malays as their subordinates.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚的经济需要公平政策，让所有族群都能从中受益。不应以种族来概括经济现象。

input_text: 不要去那家马来人开的餐厅，卫生条件差得很。马来人做生意就是这样，不讲究品质。
reason: Uses one restaurant's hygiene to stereotype all Malay business owners as lacking quality standards.
suggested_rewrite: 如果餐厅卫生有问题，可以向卫生部门投诉。不应以种族来评判商家素质。

input_text: 原住民都住在深山里，政府给了那么多钱都没用。这些人就是不想进步，浪费国家资源。
reason: Dismisses indigenous peoples as unwilling to progress and a waste of national resources, dehumanizing language.
suggested_rewrite: 原住民社区面临许多发展挑战。政府援助需要更有效地落实，同时尊重他们的文化传统。

input_text: 这个人就是在网上骗钱的诈骗犯！他的名字叫XXX，手机号是XXXX，大家转发让他无处可藏！
reason: Publicly shares personal details of an alleged scammer and incites mob-style exposure campaign.
suggested_rewrite: 如果遭遇诈骗，请向警方和MCMC报案。不要在网上公开他人个人信息。

input_text: 喝苦瓜汁可以治好糖尿病，不需要吃药。西医就是想赚你的钱，传统疗法才是真正有效的。
reason: Claims bitter gourd juice cures diabetes and discourages medical treatment, potentially life-threatening misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: 苦瓜有一定保健作用，但不能替代糖尿病药物治疗。请遵从医生的建议。

input_text: 选举到了，千万不要投马来候选人。他们上台后只会照顾自己人，华人永远是二等公民。
reason: Promotes ethnically exclusionary voting and frames all Malay candidates as biased against Chinese, polarizing elections.
suggested_rewrite: 选举时应根据候选人的政策和能力来投票，而不是根据种族。所有公民都应被公平对待。

input_text: 马来人拿了那么多特权还嫌不够，Bumiputera政策就是种族歧视。其他种族在这个国家永远是外人。
reason: Frames Bumiputera policy as pure racial discrimination and declares non-Bumiputera citizens as permanent outsiders, stoking resentment.
suggested_rewrite: 经济政策可以通过公共讨论来改善。所有马来西亚公民的权利都受宪法保障。

input_text: 印度人社区就是犯罪的温床。看看数据，偷车、抢劫、贩毒，哪个不是他们干的？
reason: Labels the Indian community as a breeding ground for crime, promoting racial stereotyping and communal blame.
suggested_rewrite: 犯罪是社会经济问题，不应归咎于任何单一族群。减少犯罪需要改善教育和就业机会。

input_text: 穆斯林在马来西亚越来越霸道了，什么都要halal，什么都要符合他们的规矩。非穆斯林的权利在哪里？
reason: Frames halal requirements as Muslim domination over non-Muslims, stoking inter-religious resentment.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚的多元宗教需求可以通过对话和相互尊重来平衡。各族群的权利都受宪法保障。

input_text: 外劳已经占领了我们的城市。到处都是孟加拉人和缅甸人，又脏又乱。政府什么时候才把他们赶走？
reason: Dehumanizes foreign workers as dirty occupiers of Malaysian cities, calling for mass deportation.
suggested_rewrite: 外劳管理需要系统化的移民政策。不应以歧视性语言来形容任何群体。

input_text: 新冠疫苗是西方国家用来控制穆斯林人口的阴谋。里面有猪的成分，穆斯林不应该接种。
reason: Anti-vaccine conspiracy combining pork content misinformation with Islamophobic population control theory, endangering Muslim community health.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚使用的疫苗已获宗教权威认可为halal。请参考卫生部的官方信息。

input_text: 华人商家就是奸商，什么东西都卖贵。马来人和印度人应该团结起来抵制他们的生意。
reason: Stereotypes Chinese merchants as dishonest profiteers and calls for multi-racial boycott against them.
suggested_rewrite: 物价问题应通过消费者保护机制来解决。以种族来抵制商家是不公平且有害的。

input_text: 印度人的庙又在路边烧东西了，烟雾弥漫，严重影响我们的健康。这种不文明的行为应该被禁止。
reason: Frames Hindu religious practices as uncivilized health hazards that should be banned, attacking minority religious expression.
suggested_rewrite: 如果对宗教活动中的烟雾有顾虑，可以与庙宇管理层和地方政府协商，寻找双方都能接受的解决方案。

input_text: 马来西亚的印度人社区是毒品问题的根源。你看看Sentul、Brickfields那些地方，全是印度人的毒窝。
reason: Labels specific neighborhoods with Indian populations as drug dens, attributing drug problems to the entire Indian community.
suggested_rewrite: 毒品问题是社会经济挑战，不应归咎于特定社区。执法应针对犯罪活动本身。

input_text: இந்த நாட்டில் மலாய்க்காரங்க எல்லாத்தையும் கட்டுப்படுத்துறாங்க. இந்தியர்களுக்கு எந்த வாய்ப்பும் இல்ல. நாம எப்போதும் இரண்டாம் தர குடிமக்கள்தான்.
reason: Frames Malays as controlling everything and Indians as permanent second-class citizens, stoking ethnic resentment.
suggested_rewrite: அனைத்து மலேசியர்களுக்கும் சம வாய்ப்புகள் கிடைக்க வேண்டும். கொள்கை மாற்றங்களுக்கு சரியான வழிகளில் குரல் கொடுப்போம்.

input_text: சீனக்காரங்க கடையில வாங்காதீங்க. அவங்க நம்ம பணத்தை எடுத்துட்டு சீனாவுக்கு அனுப்புறாங்க. நம்ம சொந்த மக்களை ஆதரிப்போம்.
reason: Race-based boycott of Chinese-owned shops with false claim they send money to China, promoting ethnic economic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: தரமான சேவை வழங்கும் உள்ளூர் வணிகங்களை ஆதரிப்போம். இனத்தின் அடிப்படையில் கடைகளை புறக்கணிப்பது தவறு.

input_text: பழங்குடி மக்கள் இன்னும் காட்டுமிராண்டிகள் மாதிரி வாழ்றாங்க. அரசாங்கம் கோடிக்கணக்கில் செலவழிச்சும் மாற மாட்டாங்க. சோம்பேறிங்க.
reason: Calls indigenous peoples savages and lazy, dehumanizing them for not conforming to mainstream development models.
suggested_rewrite: ஓரங் அஸ்லி சமூகங்கள் தனித்துவமான சவால்களை எதிர்கொள்கின்றன. அவர்களின் கலாச்சாரத்தை மதிக்கும் வகையில் உதவி வழங்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: இந்த பொண்ணுதான் viral video-ல இருக்கிறவ. பேரு XXX, YYY-ல வேலை செய்றா. எல்லாரும் share பண்ணுங்க, இவளுக்கு ஒரு பாடம் கற்பிப்போம்.
reason: Doxxing a woman from a viral video with her name and workplace, inciting coordinated harassment campaign.
suggested_rewrite: யாரையும் viral video அடிப்படையில் தொந்தரவு செய்வது சட்டவிரோதம். புகார் இருந்தால் போலீசில் தெரிவிக்கவும்.

input_text: நீரழிவு நோய்க்கு வேப்பிலை ஜூஸ் போதும், மாத்திரை வேண்டாம். மருத்துவர்கள் உங்களை ஏமாற்றுறாங்க, பணம் பண்ணுறாங்க.
reason: Claims neem juice can replace diabetes medication and accuses doctors of fraud, potentially fatal health misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: வேப்பிலைக்கு சில நன்மைகள் உண்டு, ஆனால் நீரழிவு மருந்துகளை மாற்ற முடியாது. மருத்துவரின் ஆலோசனையைப் பின்பற்றுங்க.

input_text: தேர்தலில் மலாய் வேட்பாளர்களுக்கு வாக்களிக்காதீர்கள். அவர்கள் வெற்றி பெற்றால் இந்தியர்களின் கோவில்கள் எல்லாம் இடிக்கப்படும்.
reason: Fear-mongering that Malay candidates will demolish Hindu temples, using religion to polarize voters along ethnic lines.
suggested_rewrite: வேட்பாளர்களை அவர்களின் கொள்கைகள் மற்றும் சாதனைகளின் அடிப்படையில் மதிப்பிடுங்கள். அனைத்து வழிபாட்டுத் தலங்களும் சட்டத்தால் பாதுகாக்கப்படுகின்றன.

input_text: இந்த ஆளுதான் Setapak-ல சிறுமியை தொந்தரவு செய்தவன். அவன் வீட்டு முகவரி இதுதான். யாராவது போய் சரியான பாடம் கற்பிங்க.
reason: Shares home address of an accused person and incites physical retribution, vigilante doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: குற்றச்செயல்கள் குறித்த தகவல்களை போலீசிடம் தெரிவிக்கவும். தனிநபர்களின் முகவரியை பகிர்வதும் தண்டிக்க முயற்சிப்பதும் சட்டவிரோதம்.

input_text: மலாய் மக்கள் சோம்பேறிகள், அரசாங்க உதவியை நம்பி வாழ்றாங்க. வேலை செய்ய மாட்டாங்க. அதனால்தான் நாடு முன்னேறல.
reason: Sweeping denigration of Malays as lazy government-dependent people responsible for national stagnation.
suggested_rewrite: பொருளாதார சவால்கள் பல காரணிகளால் உருவாகின்றன. எந்த சமூகத்தையும் பொதுமைப்படுத்துவது தீர்வு அல்ல.

input_text: இந்தியர்களுக்கு எதிரான Bumiputera கொள்கை ஒரு திட்டமிட்ட இன ஒடுக்குமுறை. மலாய்க்காரர்கள் நம்மை அடிமையாக வைத்திருக்க விரும்புகிறார்கள்.
reason: Frames Bumiputera policy as planned racial oppression and accuses Malays of wanting to enslave Indians, extremely divisive framing.
suggested_rewrite: பொருளாதார கொள்கைகள் குறித்த கவலைகளை முறையான வழிகளில் பேசலாம். அனைவருக்கும் நியாயமான வாய்ப்புகள் கிடைக்க வேண்டும்.

input_text: Bro kedai mamak tu halal ke tak? Owner dia nampak macam bukan Islam. Better avoid je la, mana tau makanan tu tak halal.
reason: Questions a restaurant's halal status based on the owner's perceived ethnicity/religion, promoting suspicion and avoidance based on appearance.
suggested_rewrite: Kalau nak pastikan status halal, semak sijil JAKIM yang dipamerkan di premis. Jangan buat andaian berdasarkan rupa pemilik.

input_text: Aiya this Malay government servant so slow la. Ask for one document also take 3 months. No wonder country cannot progress, semua macam tu.
reason: Attributes government inefficiency to Malay civil servants' ethnicity, using a mixed-language complaint to stereotype and denigrate.
suggested_rewrite: Bureaucratic delays are frustrating. File a formal complaint to improve service efficiency instead of blaming any ethnic group.

input_text: Weh korang, this Chinese towkay exploit Malay workers pastu bayar minimum je. Memang la bangsa dia, always nak take advantage of orang kita.
reason: Frames labor exploitation as an ethnic trait of Chinese employers, using mixed Malay-English to spread communal hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Worker exploitation should be reported to JTK regardless of the employer's ethnicity. Labor rights apply to all workers.

input_text: Bro that Indian guy kena tangkap for drunk driving. Typical la bro, kaum ni memang suka minum. It's in their blood already.
reason: Uses a drunk driving arrest to stereotype all Indians as alcoholics with it 'in their blood', racial profiling through mixed-language post.
suggested_rewrite: Drunk driving is a serious offence regardless of the driver's ethnicity. Don't generalize individual crimes to entire communities.

input_text: Don't trust Malay doctors la. They masuk universiti through quota system, bukan sebab pandai. Chinese doctors lagi reliable.
reason: Undermines trust in Malay doctors by attributing their qualifications to quotas rather than merit, dangerous in healthcare context.
suggested_rewrite: All licensed doctors in Malaysia meet rigorous professional standards. Choose your doctor based on credentials and expertise, not ethnicity.

input_text: Wei 这个area越来越多foreigner了。Dulu semua Chinese neighborhood, sekarang penuh Bangladesh people. Property value sure drop one, kita kena buat something.
reason: Mixed Malay-Chinese-English post blaming Bangladeshi migrants for property value drops and calling for action to remove them from a neighborhood.
suggested_rewrite: Property value concerns should be addressed through proper local council channels. All residents deserve to live peacefully regardless of background.

input_text: Bruh this viral video girl tu actually my schoolmate la. Nama dia [name], sekarang kerja kat [company] in PJ. Deserve to be exposed for what she did.
reason: Identifies a person from a viral video with real name and employer, mixed-language doxxing to encourage public shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Don't identify or expose anyone from viral videos. If there's actual wrongdoing, report it to the authorities instead.

input_text: Eh this ubat Cina ni can cure cancer one tau. My auntie makan dah recover. Western medicine semua tipu, diorang just want your money je.
reason: Claims Chinese traditional medicine cures cancer based on anecdote, discourages legitimate medical treatment using mixed-language post.
suggested_rewrite: Traditional medicine may complement treatment, but cancer requires proper medical care. Always consult qualified oncologists for cancer treatment.

input_text: Election coming bro. Kita orang Islam kena stand together. Jangan vote non-Muslim candidates, nanti they will change our Islamic laws. Think about anak cucu kita.
reason: Uses mixed Malay-English to call Muslims to vote exclusively for Muslim candidates, fear-mongering about Islamic law changes.
suggested_rewrite: Evaluate every candidate on their track record and policies. Malaysia's Constitution protects Islamic institutions regardless of who is elected.

input_text: Saya nampak driver tu langgar orang pastu lari. I got his gambar and plate number. Here — [plate]. Tolong share, biar kita cari dia sendiri since polis tak buat kerja.
reason: Mixed-language post sharing a hit-and-run suspect's photo and plate number, encouraging vigilante tracking because of distrust in police.
suggested_rewrite: Laporkan kes langgar lari kepada polis dengan semua bukti termasuk plate number. Jangan cuba cari suspek sendiri.

input_text: This cikgu perempuan yang bully my anak, she teaches at [school] in Subang. Her IG is @[handle]. Go flood her comments, biar dia tahu how it feels.
reason: Shares a teacher's school and Instagram handle to coordinate cyberbullying harassment, mixed Malay-English doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: If your child is being mistreated, lodge complaints with the school administration and education department. Don't target teachers on social media.

input_text: Eh the Orang Asli kat Cameron Highlands tu block jalan lagi because of logging issue. So backward la these people, nak duduk hutan forever ke? Let the country develop la.
reason: Dismisses indigenous land rights protests as backward, mixed-language post mocking Orang Asli for opposing logging development.
suggested_rewrite: Orang Asli have legal rights to their customary land. Development should include proper consultation with affected indigenous communities.

input_text: Woi siapa yang kenal janitor kat mall tu yang kena viral for peeping? Ni dia kerja kat [mall name]. Sapa area situ, pergi confront dia. Don't let him get away with it.
reason: Identifies a suspect's workplace and incites physical confrontation, mixed Malay-English vigilante doxxing.
suggested_rewrite: Report peeping incidents to mall security and police immediately. Don't confront or expose suspects yourself.

input_text: 这些外劳的孩子占了我们学校的位置lah. Local students都没有机会了。Kerajaan should deport all these illegal immigrants and their families.
reason: Mixed Chinese-Malay-English post blaming foreign worker children for taking school places and calling for mass deportation of families.
suggested_rewrite: Education capacity issues should be addressed through policy improvements. All children have a right to education regardless of their parents' status.

input_text: Apasal la bagi org India jadi CEO syarikat GLC? Diorang bukan Bumiputera pun. Kerja kerajaan tu untuk anak Melayu, bukan kaum lain.
reason: Opposes Indian representation in GLCs based purely on ethnicity, promoting racial gatekeeping of public positions.
suggested_rewrite: Jawatan di GLC patut diberi berdasarkan kebolehan dan kelayakan. Semua rakyat Malaysia layak berkhidmat untuk negara.

input_text: Tamil school kids cannot even speak proper Malay or English. What future do they have? Their parents are so selfish sending them to these useless schools.
reason: Attacks Tamil school education and parents' choices as selfish and useless, denigrating minority community educational rights.
suggested_rewrite: All schools should equip students with strong multilingual skills. Education policy improvements can benefit students across all school types.

input_text: Someone needs to compile a list of all the Chinese-owned properties in this area so we know who to target for our boycott campaign.
reason: Calls for compiling ethnic ownership data for targeted boycott, echoing historical patterns of communal targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Compiling lists targeting businesses by the owner's ethnicity is discriminatory and dangerous. Economic concerns should be addressed through fair policy.

input_text: 马来人开的修车厂千万不要去，他们只会骗钱。换个零件收你三倍价钱，反正也修不好。
reason: Stereotypes all Malay-owned workshops as fraudulent and incompetent, promoting racial boycott of services.
suggested_rewrite: 选择修车厂时应看评价和口碑，不应以老板的种族来判断服务质量。

input_text: இந்தியர்கள் எப்போதும் பலிக்கடா ஆக்கப்படுகிறார்கள். சீனர்கள் பொருளாதாரத்தை ஆள்கிறார்கள், ஆனால் யாரும் அவர்களை கேள்வி கேட்பதில்லை. நாம் சீனர்களை எதிர்த்து நிற்க வேண்டும்.
reason: Pits Indians against Chinese by claiming Chinese control the economy unchallenged, calling for ethnic opposition.
suggested_rewrite: பொருளாதார சமத்துவம் அனைத்து சமூகங்களுக்கும் முக்கியம். ஒரு இனத்தை எதிர்ப்பது தீர்வு அல்ல, கொள்கை மாற்றங்களுக்கு பாடுபடுவோம்.

input_text: Bro I heard that bomoh near Rawang boleh cure HIV with air doa. Better than taking those expensive ARV drugs. Kerajaan hide this info because pharmaceutical companies bayar diorang.
reason: Mixed-language post promoting faith healer as HIV cure, discouraging life-saving ARV medication with government conspiracy theory.
suggested_rewrite: HIV treatment requires proper ARV medication from qualified doctors. Traditional or spiritual practices cannot replace medical treatment for HIV.
